DustLimiting.Warning70Message: 🧙‍♀️ The magic dust in the cauldron is running low ({percent}% left)...
DustLimiting.Warning90Message: 🧙‍♀️ The cauldron is almost empty — wrap up soon, the dust is nearly gone ({percent}% left).
DustLimiting.ErrorMessage: 🧙‍♀️ The magic dust from this conversation has run out. This conversation is now complete — start a new one to keep going.

HistoryReducer.SummarizationPrompt: Generate a concise summary of this conversation in 3-4 sentences. ALWAYS preserve: user and assistant contributions, previous summary details, user IDs (userId, customer ID), invoice/contract numbers (INV-YYYY-####), exact money amounts, dates and deadlines, tool calls made, quick reply options and rich cards offered, shared context variables, and unresolved issues. NEVER: critique, speculate, paraphrase numerical data, or omit critical business information from earlier summaries.

RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerMinute: ✋ Whoa there! You're casting spells too quickly. Please wait a moment before trying again.
RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerHour: ⏰ You've reached your hourly spell quota. The magic cauldron needs time to recharge!
RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerDay: 🌙 You've exhausted today's magical energy. Return tomorrow for more spells!
RateLimiting.ErrorMessageDefault: ⚠️ You're sending messages too quickly. Please slow down.
